texts.label: text
texts.orig: For 2025, the commissionable rate is 20%, and for 2026, it is 15%. Christmas rates are commissionable at 10%. Please note that for East African residents, the resident rates are applicable but are commissionable at 10%.
texts.text: For 2025, the commissionable rate is 20%, and for 2026, it is 15%. Christmas rates are commissionable at 10%. Please note that for East African residents, the resident rates are applicable but are commissionable at 10%.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are pleased to offer a discount for group bookings, which will be extended once the booking voucher is shared and will depend on the group size.
texts.text: We are pleased to offer a discount for group bookings, which will be extended once the booking voucher is shared and will depend on the group size.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To confirm a booking, a 75% deposit of the total proforma invoice amount is required. Additionally, we have attached some pictures of the hotel for your reference.
texts.text: To confirm a booking, a 75% deposit of the total proforma invoice amount is required. Additionally, we have attached some pictures of the hotel for your reference.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should you require any further clarification or wish to make a reservation, please do not hesitate to contact us directly at +254768711111.
texts.text: Should you require any further clarification or wish to make a reservation, please do not hesitate to contact us directly at +254768711111.
